title: Triage and respond to a customer escalation email
description: The agent must read an inbound customer email expressing frustration about a delayed shipment, identify the order in the customer database, draft an empathetic reply with a concrete resolution, and CC the relevant support manager.

environment.context: Inbox has 3 unread emails; customer's most recent order id is ORD-48921.

task.goal: Resolve the customer's complaint within one email exchange and document the action in CRM.

steps.action: Look up order ORD-48921 in the CRM
Draft and send an empathetic reply that includes the new ETA, CC manager_1
Log the resolution as a CRM note

success_criteria: Reply email is sent to the customer and CCs manager_1
Reply email references order ORD-48921 specifically
A CRM note is added to ORD-48921 with the resolution details
Tone of reply is empathetic and not templated
